market_regime: Risk-off rotation with AI/tech recovery bounce; elevated VIX 19.5 (+13% 20d); bond rally signaling rate cut expectations; gold correcting from highs; energy sector losing momentum; geopolitical cross-currents (US-Iran, Hormuz, China REE controls) favor defense, tankers, and domestic AI supply chain

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Tanker sector outside scanner universe; geopolitical trigger (Hormuz closure) post-dates scanner data collection; record P/E 7.5x earnings invisible to backward-looking screens
Foreign-listed ADR from Brazil; US-centric scanner misses the world's largest digital bank growing at 35% at Fwd PE 10.6x with Berkshire ownership
RSI 25.85 (most oversold S&P 500) is a real-time technical signal; scanner's batch data collection doesn't capture extreme oversold conditions; guidance raised on same quarter
Post-Versant spinoff creates YoY earnings decline artifact that triggers scanner's earnings-growth exclusion filter — mechanical blind spot to spinoff accounting
Iran removes 900M barrels from global supply — catalyst is in the Q1 earnings call transcript, not in any financial database; scanner cannot parse earnings commentary for geopolitical intelligence
Airline sector blacklisted in most systematic strategies post-2020; Berkshire $2.65B re-entry Q1 2026 13F is very recent and not yet reflected in scanner's institutional ownership data
Classified as COVID vaccine with declining revenue — scanner's revenue-growth filter deprioritizes it; mRNA oncology ASCO data is in conference presentations, not financial databases
$4B hyperscale contract and AI cooling spinoff announced in press release; below scanner market cap thresholds; pure-play re-rating requires reading the spinoff filing
Sub-$1B market cap below scanner thresholds; DoD offtake agreement via DoD press release not captured in financial data; production inflection point requires facility visit/industry knowledge
TD Ameritrade integration depresses lagging earnings — scanner sees 'poor quality'; real-time institutional options block ($5.15M Dec call spread) is flow data outside scanner's data sources

Discovery: FDA PDUFA target date July 7, 2026 for atacicept BLA in IgA Nephropathy (Priority Review); Phase 3 ORIGIN showed 46% proteinuria reduction and 42% UPCR reduction vs placebo — first B-cell modulator targeting both BAFF and APRIL for IgAN, a high-unmet-need indication.
value_picks.analyst_take: FDA PDUFA July 7 (25 days); Priority Review + BTD; Phase 3 46% proteinuria reduction; $596M cash; 43% below 52W high; binary R/R ~75% up vs 43% down

catalysts_general: Q2 FY2026 ARR $2.36B +10% YoY; aerospace/defense manufacturing customers driving Windchill PLM adoption (Tier 1: Q2 FY2026 earnings)
value_picks.analyst_take: ARR $2.36B +10% YoY; ServiceMax/Windchill PLM integration; winning aerospace/defense reshoring manufacturing; industrial IoT system of record

catalysts_general: Q1 2026 revenue $771M +32% YoY; 4th consecutive profitable quarter; 12.7M members; bank charter enables FDIC deposits (Tier 1: Q1 2026 earnings transcript)
value_picks.analyst_take: 12.7M members +34% YoY; 4th consecutive profitable quarter; bank charter lowers cost of funds; student loan refinancing recovering

catalysts_general: Q1 2026 revenue $2.5B +15% YoY; 2027 bookings 40% above pre-pandemic at +22% pricing; D/E improved from 5.9x to 2.1x through debt paydown (Tier 1: Q1 2026 earnings transcript)

Discovery: Director Stephen Pagliuca (CEO of PagsGroup, ex-Bain Capital) purchased 1.38M shares for ~$25M on June 1–2, 2026 at ~$18.11/share — nearly doubling his position — coinciding with 1,000 Dec-2026 $20 call contracts bought for $285K in the options market, reinforcing the bullish signal.
value_picks.analyst_take: 2027 bookings 40% above pre-pandemic at +22% pricing YoY; D/E improved 5.9x to 2.1x; Fwd PE 10x; net yield per passenger day +9%

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Intelligent devices segment +13% YoY Q2 2026; OTTO AMR production at Milwaukee HQ; $3T reshoring wave cited but FY2025 revenue -8% YoY overall (Tier 1: Q2 2026 earnings, Tier 2: AMR production PR)

Discovery: Intelligent devices segment up 13% YoY in Q2 2026; now manufacturing OTTO 600/1200 autonomous mobile robots at Milwaukee HQ — largest US industrial company building AMRs domestically; positioned as physical AI beneficiary with factory automation driven by labor shortages
growth_picks.analyst_take: AMR/reshoring thesis legitimate but revenue declined 8% FY2025; need Q3 2026 to show genuine inflection before entering

growth_picks.analyst_take: GE Aerospace excellent but Fwd PE 36x is stretched; wait for pullback to $155-165

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: DoD $400M equity stake confirmed; $110/kg NdPr floor contract in force; heavy REE separation facility targeting mid-2026; China +45% REE price hike (Tier 2: DoD PR, Tier 4: Reuters)

Discovery: The DoD took a $400M equity stake in MP Materials and locked in a 10-year price floor of $110/kg on NdPr output, shielding revenue from Chinese overproduction; China's rare earth export control suspension expires November 10, 2026 — that hard deadline is an approaching re-rating catalyst as defense industrial policy institutionalizes domestic rare earth supply.
growth_picks.analyst_take: DoD $400M stake + $110/kg floor real, but 38% SI and Nov 2026 export ban deadline partly priced in; wait for <$18 entry

catalysts_general: iPhone 17 cycle underwhelming initial reviews; Apple Intelligence adoption slow per developer surveys; analyst consensus 12M target $210 vs current $200 (Tier 5: Yahoo Finance consensus)
growth_picks.analyst_take: Analyst consensus upside only 5% at current $200; PEG 2.4 with 6% revenue growth; not a value buy here; entry at $170-175

growth_picks.analyst_take: P/E 20x not cheap enough with North America share loss to On Running/New Balance; wait for Elliott Hill first full year FY2026 Q4

catalysts_general: Securities fraud class action filed June 9 2026 for alleged Q3 FY2024 financial misstatements; otherwise strong drone defense thesis with Ukraine/Middle East demand (Tier 4: Reuters legal filing)

Discovery: AeroVironment's Switchblade loitering munition is the signature weapon of the Ukraine conflict, driving a 222% revenue increase since the war began, and the company just secured a $874M DoD IDIQ contract for drone/counter-UAS export — yet the stock shed roughly half its value from the January 2026 all-time high, creating a potential re-entry on a proven conflict beneficiary.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Securities fraud class action filed June 9 2026 for Q3 FY2024 financial misstatements — never enter under active securities litigation
